old_value: Thought to be communications satellite for Northern latitudes. Built for verification tests of new technologies such as space environmental monitoring.
new_value: Chinese experimental technology satellite developed by the Shanghai Academy of Spaceflight Technology (SAST). Although Chinese authorities have not disclosed its specific mission, the Shiyan series is generally used to validate new space technologies, sensors, communications systems, and other advanced spacecraft capabilities.
Not publicly confirmed (impulsive ~12-hr apogee/perigee burns are consistent with a chemical/hypergolic main propulsion system)

Unknown (not publicly disclosed) | Russian maneuvering "parent" inspector that deployed a sub-satellite (Cosmos 2590) and conducted extended close-proximity operations before circularizing into the GEO belt to enable on-orbit inspection of other satellites | Strongly assessed by Western analysts as a Nivelir-lineage system; released sub-satellite Cosmos 2590 on 26 Jun 2025; conducted months of RPO at sub-2 km separations; circularization sequence completed by spring 2026

new_value: Classified Russian military GEO satellite built by ISS Reshetnev (likely on the Ekspress-2000 bus, ~2.3 t); launched on the first operational Angara A5/Briz-M from Plesetsk Site 35/1 carrying live payloads; exact mission and configuration not officially disclosed

old_value: Space environment monitoring and related technology tests

new_value: Experimental HTS Communications Satellite. | Re-flight of the Long March 5 following the failure in July 2017. Flew without YZ-2 upper stage on Long March 5 as had LIPS-300 electrical engine to raise orbit.HTS payload capable of 300 gps. Also carrying high-thrust ion propulsion developed by the Lanzhou Institute of Physics for performance test and a laser communications payload and a quantum communications payload.
CAST - Chinese Academy of Space Technology

old_value: Experimental HTS Communications Satellite. | Re-flight of the Long March 5 following the failure in July 2017. Flew without YZ-2 upper stage on Long March 5 as had LIPS-300 electrical engine to raise orbit.HTS payload capable of 300 gps. Also carrying high-thrust ion propulsion developed by the Lanzhou Institute of Physics for performance test and a laser communications payload and a quantum communications payload.
new_value: Chinese satellite supporting commercial operations. Its mission is communications as an experimental DFH-5-based GEO satellite focused on technology demonstration, including high-throughput, laser, and quantum communications payloads.
